760	/-- The prime ideal of `𝒪ₓ(U)` corresponding to a point `x : U`. -/
761	noncomputable def primeIdealOf (x : U) :
762	    PrimeSpectrum Γ(X, U) :=
763	  hU.isoSpec.hom x
764	
765	theorem fromSpec_primeIdealOf (x : U) :
766	    hU.fromSpec (hU.primeIdealOf x) = x.1 := by
767	  dsimp only [IsAffineOpen.fromSpec, Subtype.coe_mk, IsAffineOpen.primeIdealOf]
768	  rw [← Scheme.Hom.comp_apply, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]
769	  rfl

80	module pullback along any scheme morphism is an isomorphism (the underlying site functor
81	`Opens.map g.base` is final by `opensMap_final`). -/
82	instance pullbackObjUnitToUnit_isIso_hom {Y X : Scheme.{u}} (g : Y ⟶ X) :
83	    IsIso (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit g.toRingCatSheafHom) :=
84	  inferInstance
85	
86	/-- The structure-sheaf unit iso `g^* 𝒪_X ≅ 𝒪_Y` for an arbitrary scheme morphism,
87	packaged for `Presentation.map`. -/
88	noncomputable def pullbackUnitIso {Y X : Scheme.{u}} (g : Y ⟶ X) :
89	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf) ≅
90	      SheafOfModules.unit Y.ringCatSheaf :=
91	  @asIso _ _ _ _ _ (pullbackObjUnitToUnit_isIso_hom g)
92	
93	/-! ## The per-slice presentation of a pullback -/
94	
95	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
96	set_option synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 1000000 in
97	set_option maxHeartbeats 2000000 in
98	/-- **The per-slice presentation of a pullback**: a presentation of `F.over A` induces a
99	presentation of the slice `(g^* F).over (g ⁻¹ᵁ A)`, for an arbitrary scheme morphism
100	`g : Y ⟶ X`.
101	
102	Route: let `W := g ⁻¹ᵁ A` and `gA := g.resLE A W : W ⟶ A` the restricted morphism.  The
103	X-side bridge (`presentationRestrictOfOver` at `W := A`) presents the full restriction
104	`F.restrict A.ι`; the restricted pullback `(pullback gA)` transports it
105	(`Presentation.map`, unit iso by `pullbackUnitIso`); the pullback pseudofunctor square
106	`gA ≫ A.ι = W.ι ≫ g` (`resLE_comp_ι`) identifies `(pullback gA).obj (F.restrict A.ι)`
107	with `(g^* F).restrict W.ι`; the V-side bridge engine (`modulesOverOpensEquivalence`
108	over `Y`) carries the presentation back to the over-slice. -/
109	noncomputable def presentationPullbackSliceOfOver {Y X : Scheme.{u}} (g : Y ⟶ X)
110	    (F : X.Modules) (A : X.Opens) (P : (F.over A).Presentation) :
111	    (((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F).over (g ⁻¹ᵁ A)).Presentation := by
112	  set W : Y.Opens := g ⁻¹ᵁ A with hW
113	  set G : Y.Modules := (Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F with hG
114	  -- X-side: present the full restriction to `A`.
115	  letI P1 : (F.restrict A.ι).Presentation := presentationRestrictOfOver A F A P le_rfl
116	  -- The restricted morphism `W ⟶ A`.
117	  letI gA : W.toScheme ⟶ A.toScheme := g.resLE A W le_rfl
118	  -- Transport the presentation along the restricted pullback (colimit-preserving; unit ↦ unit).
119	  haveI hpc : Limits.PreservesColimitsOfSize.{u, u, u, u, u + 1, u + 1}
120	      (Scheme.Modules.pullback gA) := inferInstance
121	  letI P2 : ((Scheme.Modules.pullback gA).obj (F.restrict A.ι)).Presentation :=
122	    @SheafOfModules.Presentation.map _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ P1
123	      (Scheme.Modules.pullback gA) hpc (pullbackUnitIso gA).symm
124	  -- Identify with the restriction of the global pullback via the pseudofunctor square.

text: Now the pushout/base-change section and its `Module.Flat.of_isPushout` machinery.

data.content:
558	is by the universal property (`IsBaseChange.of_lift_unique`): an
559	`R`-linear map `g : M → Q` into an `S`-module extends to `B ⊗[A] M` by
560	lifting the `A`-indexed family `a ↦ (m ↦ g (a • m))` through the ring
561	base change `B = S ⊗[R] A` (`Algebra.IsPushout.out.lift`) and applying
562	the balanced-product constructor `TensorProduct.liftAddHom`. -/
563	
564	section FlatPushout
565	
566	open TensorProduct
567	
568	variable (R S A B : Type v) [CommRing R] [CommRing S] [CommRing A] [CommRing B]
569	variable [Algebra R S] [Algebra R A] [Algebra R B] [Algebra A B] [Algebra S B]
570	variable [IsScalarTower R A B] [IsScalarTower R S B]
571	variable (M : Type v) [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M] [Module A M] [IsScalarTower R A M]
572	
573	attribute [local instance] SMulCommClass.of_commMonoid
574	
575	set_option maxSynthPendingDepth 3 in
576	/-- **`B ⊗[A] M` is the base change of `M` along `R → S`** for a pushout square
577	`B = S ⊗[R] A` [Stacks 00HI, module form].  The `S`-module structure on
578	`B ⊗[A] M` is through the left factor. -/
579	theorem isBaseChange_pushout_tensorProduct [h : Algebra.IsPushout R S A B] :
580	    IsBaseChange S (((TensorProduct.mk A B M) 1).restrictScalars R) := by
581	  apply IsBaseChange.of_lift_unique
582	  intro Q _ _ _ _ g
583	  -- the `A`-indexed family of `R`-linear maps `m ↦ g (a • m)`
584	  let β : A →ₗ[R] (M →ₗ[R] Q) :=
585	    { toFun := fun a =>
586	        { toFun := fun m => g (a • m)
587	          map_add' := fun x y => by rw [smul_add, map_add]
588	          map_smul' := fun r x => by
589	            rw [RingHom.id_apply, smul_comm, map_smul] }
590	      map_add' := fun a₁ a₂ => LinearMap.ext fun m => by
591	        simp only [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, add_smul, map_add,
592	          LinearMap.add_apply]
593	      map_smul' := fun r a => LinearMap.ext fun m => by
594	        simp only [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, RingHom.id_apply,
595	          LinearMap.smul_apply, ← map_smul, smul_assoc] }
596	  -- lift it through the ring base change `B = S ⊗[R] A`
597	  let Λ : B →ₗ[S] (M →ₗ[R] Q) := h.out.lift β
598	  have hΛ_alg : ∀ a : A, Λ (algebraMap A B a) = β a := fun a => by
599	    simpa only [AlgHom.toLinearMap_apply, IsScalarTower.coe_toAlgHom'] using
600	      h.out.lift_eq β a
601	  -- balancedness of the pairing `(b, m) ↦ Λ b m` over `A`
602	  have hbal : ∀ (a : A) (b : B) (m : M),
603	      Λ (algebraMap A B a * b) m = Λ b (a • m) := by
604	    intro a b m
605	    induction b using h.out.inductionOn with
606	    | zero => rw [mul_zero, map_zero, LinearMap.zero_apply, LinearMap.zero_apply]
607	    | tmul a' =>
608	      rw [AlgHom.toLinearMap_apply, IsScalarTower.coe_toAlgHom', ← map_mul,
609	        hΛ_alg, hΛ_alg]
610	      show g ((a * a') • m) = g (a' • a • m)
611	      rw [← smul_smul, smul_comm]
612	    | smul s b e =>
613	      rw [mul_smul_comm, map_smul, LinearMap.smul_apply, e, map_smul Λ s b,
614	        LinearMap.smul_apply]
615	    | add b₁ b₂ e₁ e₂ =>
616	      rw [mul_add, map_add, map_add, LinearMap.add_apply, LinearMap.add_apply,
617	        e₁, e₂]
618	  -- the balanced-product extension `B ⊗[A] M →+ Q`
619	  let h₀ : B ⊗[A] M →+ Q := TensorProduct.liftAddHom
620	    { toFun := fun b => (Λ b).toAddMonoidHom
621	      map_zero' := by ext m; simp only [map_zero, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe,
622	        LinearMap.zero_apply, AddMonoidHom.zero_apply]
623	      map_add' := fun b₁ b₂ => by
624	        ext m
625	        simp only [map_add, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe, LinearMap.add_apply,
626	          AddMonoidHom.add_apply] }
627	    (fun a b m => by
628	      simpa only [Algebra.smul_def, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe,
629	        AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk] using hbal a b m)
630	  have h₀_tmul : ∀ (b : B) (m : M), h₀ (b ⊗ₜ m) = Λ b m := fun b m =>
631	    TensorProduct.liftAddHom_tmul _ _ b m
632	  -- `S`-linearity of the extension
633	  have hS : ∀ (s : S) (x : B ⊗[A] M), h₀ (s • x) = s • h₀ x := by
634	    intro s x
635	    induction x with
636	    | zero => rw [smul_zero, map_zero, smul_zero]
637	    | tmul b m =>
638	      rw [smul_tmul', h₀_tmul, h₀_tmul, map_smul, LinearMap.smul_apply]
639	    | add x y ex ey => rw [smul_add, map_add, ex, ey, map_add, smul_add]
640	  refine ⟨{ toFun := h₀, map_add' := map_add h₀, map_smul' := hS }, ?_, ?_⟩
641	  · -- the extension restricts to `g` along `m ↦ 1 ⊗ m`
642	    apply LinearMap.ext
643	    intro m
644	    show h₀ ((1 : B) ⊗ₜ m) = g m
645	    rw [h₀_tmul, show (1 : B) = algebraMap A B 1 from (map_one _).symm, hΛ_alg]
646	    show g ((1 : A) • m) = g m
647	    rw [one_smul]
648	  · -- uniqueness
649	    intro h' hh'
650	    apply LinearMap.ext
651	    intro x
652	    show h' x = h₀ x
653	    induction x with
654	    | zero => rw [map_zero, map_zero]
655	    | tmul b m =>
656	      rw [h₀_tmul]
657	      induction b using h.out.inductionOn with
658	      | zero => rw [zero_tmul, map_zero, map_zero, LinearMap.zero_apply]
659	      | tmul a =>
660	        rw [AlgHom.toLinearMap_apply, IsScalarTower.coe_toAlgHom', hΛ_alg]
661	        have : (algebraMap A B a) ⊗ₜ[A] m = (1 : B) ⊗ₜ[A] (a • m) := by
662	          rw [Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one, smul_tmul]
663	        rw [this]
664	        have h2 := congrArg (fun (φ : M →ₗ[R] Q) => φ (a • m)) hh'
665	        simp only [LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_restrictScalars,
666	          Function.comp_apply, TensorProduct.mk_apply] at h2
667	        exact h2
668	      | smul s b e =>
669	        rw [← smul_tmul', map_smul, e, map_smul Λ s b, LinearMap.smul_apply]
670	      | add b₁ b₂ e₁ e₂ =>
671	        rw [add_tmul, map_add, map_add, LinearMap.add_apply, e₁, e₂]
672	    | add x y ex ey => rw [map_add, map_add, ex, ey]
673	
674	set_option maxSynthPendingDepth 3 in
675	/-- **Flatness under pushout base change** [Stacks 00HI, module form].  Let
676	`B = S ⊗[R] A` be a pushout of rings (`Algebra.IsPushout R S A B`), `M` an
677	`A`-module flat over `R`, and `N` a `B`-module which is a base change of `M`
678	along `A → B` (`IsBaseChange B f`).  Then `N` is flat over `S` (acting through
679	`S → B`).  Mathlib covers `A = R`, `B = S` (`Module.Flat.baseChange`); this
680	mixed form is the per-piece engine of the flattening stratification. -/
681	theorem _root_.Module.Flat.of_isPushout [h : Algebra.IsPushout R S A B]
682	    {N : Type v} [AddCommGroup N] [Module A N] [Module B N] [Module S N]
683	    [IsScalarTower A B N] [IsScalarTower S B N]
684	    {f : M →ₗ[A] N} (hf : IsBaseChange B f) [Module.Flat R M] :
685	    Module.Flat S N := by
686	  haveI : Module.Flat S (B ⊗[A] M) :=
687	    Module.Flat.isBaseChange (R := R) (S := S) (M := M) (B ⊗[A] M)
688	      (isBaseChange_pushout_tensorProduct R S A B M)
689	  exact Module.Flat.of_linearEquiv (hf.equiv.restrictScalars S).symm
690	
691	end FlatPushout
692	
693	/-! ## §4. Affine pieces of a fibre-product square
694	
695	For a cartesian square `H : IsPullback g iY iX f` (so `Y = X ×ₛ T` with
696	projections `g : Y ⟶ X`, `iY : Y ⟶ T` over `iX : X ⟶ S`, `f : T ⟶ S`) and
697	affine opens `US ⊆ S`, `UX ⊆ iX⁻¹US`, `UT ⊆ f⁻¹US`, the **piece**
698	`UY := g⁻¹UX ⊓ iY⁻¹UT ⊆ Y` is an affine open whose section ring is the
699	pushout `Γ(X,UX) ⊗_{Γ(S,US)} Γ(T,UT)` (Mathlib's
700	`isIso_pushoutSection_of_isAffineOpen`), and whose `F`-pullback sections are
701	the base change `Γ(Y,UY) ⊗_{Γ(X,UX)} Γ(F,UX)` (the Lane F section formula
702	`pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv`, Stacks 01HQ/01I8).
703	Combining the two with `Module.Flat.of_isPushout` (§3) transports flatness
704	of `Γ(F,UX)` over `Γ(S,US)` to flatness of the piece sections over
705	`Γ(T,UT)`; `Module.Finite.base_change` similarly transports finiteness over
706	the fibre ring.  These are the two per-piece inputs of the
707	flattening-stratification induction. -/
708	
709	section PullbackPiece
710	
711	open TensorProduct
712	
713	variable {X Y S T : Scheme.{u}} {f : T ⟶ S} {g : Y ⟶ X} {iX : X ⟶ S} {iY : Y ⟶ T}
714	variable (H : IsPullback g iY iX f)
715	variable {US : S.Opens} {UT : T.Opens} {UX : X.Opens}
716	variable (hUST : UT ≤ f ⁻¹ᵁ US) (hUSX : UX ≤ iX ⁻¹ᵁ US)
717	
718	include H hUST hUSX
719	
720	/-- The piece `g⁻¹UX ⊓ iY⁻¹UT` of a fibre-product square over affine opens is
721	affine: it is isomorphic to the pullback of the restricted affine cospan
722	(`Scheme.Hom.isPullback_resLE`). -/
723	theorem isAffineOpen_pullback_piece (hUS : IsAffineOpen US) (hUT : IsAffineOpen UT)
724	    (hUX : IsAffineOpen UX) : IsAffineOpen (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) := by
725	  have : IsAffine US := hUS
726	  have : IsAffine UT := hUT
727	  have : IsAffine UX := hUX
728	  exact IsAffine.of_isIso (Scheme.Hom.isPullback_resLE H hUST hUSX rfl).isoPullback.hom
729	
730	/-- The section-ring square of a fibre-product square at an affine piece is a
731	pushout in `CommRingCat` (Mathlib's `isIso_pushoutSection_of_isAffineOpen`,
732	repackaged). -/
733	theorem isPushout_appLE_pullback_piece (hUS : IsAffineOpen US) (hUT : IsAffineOpen UT)
734	    (hUX : IsAffineOpen UX) :
735	    CategoryTheory.IsPushout (iX.appLE US UX hUSX) (f.appLE US UT hUST)
736	      (g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left)
737	      (iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right) :=
738	  (isIso_pushoutSection_iff H hUST hUSX rfl).mp
739	    (isIso_pushoutSection_of_isAffineOpen H hUST hUSX rfl hUS hUT hUX)
740	
741	set_option maxSynthPendingDepth 3 in
742	/-- **Per-piece flatness transfer.**  If the `F`-sections on the affine
743	`UX ⊆ X` are flat over the affine `US ⊆ S`, then for any affine `UT ⊆ T`
744	above `US`, the pulled-back sections on the piece `g⁻¹UX ⊓ iY⁻¹UT ⊆ Y` are
745	flat over `UT`.  This is `Module.Flat.of_isPushout` (§3) fed with the ring
746	pushout of `isPushout_appLE_pullback_piece` and the Lane F base-change
747	section formula. -/
748	theorem flat_section_pullback_piece (F : X.Modules) [F.IsQuasicoherent]
749	    (hUS : IsAffineOpen US) (hUT : IsAffineOpen UT) (hUX : IsAffineOpen UX)
750	    (hflat :
751	      letI : Module Γ(S, US) Γ(F, UX) := Module.compHom _ (iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom
752	      Module.Flat Γ(S, US) Γ(F, UX)) :
753	    letI : Module Γ(T, UT) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
754	      Module.compHom _ (iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right).hom
755	    Module.Flat Γ(T, UT) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) := by
756	  have hUY : IsAffineOpen (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
757	    isAffineOpen_pullback_piece H hUST hUSX hUS hUT hUX
758	  -- ring algebra structures on the four corners
759	  letI : Algebra Γ(S, US) Γ(X, UX) := (iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom.toAlgebra
760	  letI : Algebra Γ(S, US) Γ(T, UT) := (f.appLE US UT hUST).hom.toAlgebra
761	  letI : Algebra Γ(X, UX) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
762	    (g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left).hom.toAlgebra
763	  letI : Algebra Γ(T, UT) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
764	    (iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right).hom.toAlgebra
765	  letI : Algebra Γ(S, US) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
766	    ((g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left).hom.comp
767	      (iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom).toAlgebra
768	  haveI : IsScalarTower Γ(S, US) Γ(X, UX) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
769	    IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq' rfl
770	  haveI : IsScalarTower Γ(S, US) Γ(T, UT) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
771	    IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq' (by
772	      show ((g.appLE UX _ inf_le_left).hom.comp (iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom) =
773	        (iY.appLE UT _ inf_le_right).hom.comp (f.appLE US UT hUST).hom
774	      have key : ∀ (φ : Y ⟶ S) (_ : iY ≫ f = φ)
775	          (w₁ : (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) ≤ φ ⁻¹ᵁ US)
776	          (w₂ : (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) ≤ (iY ≫ f) ⁻¹ᵁ US),
777	          φ.appLE US (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) w₁ =
778	            (iY ≫ f).appLE US (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) w₂ := by
779	        rintro φ rfl w₁ w₂; rfl
780	      have h1 : iX.appLE US UX hUSX ≫ g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left =
781	          f.appLE US UT hUST ≫ iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right := by
782	        rw [Scheme.Hom.appLE_comp_appLE, Scheme.Hom.appLE_comp_appLE]
783	        exact key (g ≫ iX) H.w.symm _ _
784	      exact congrArg CommRingCat.Hom.hom h1)
785	  -- the pushout of section rings, in `Algebra.IsPushout` form
786	  haveI hpo₁ : Algebra.IsPushout Γ(S, US) Γ(X, UX) Γ(T, UT)
787	      Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
788	    CommRingCat.isPushout_iff_isPushout.mp
789	      (isPushout_appLE_pullback_piece H hUST hUSX hUS hUT hUX)
790	  haveI hpo₂ : Algebra.IsPushout Γ(S, US) Γ(T, UT) Γ(X, UX)
791	      Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) := hpo₁.symm
792	  -- module structures on the sections
793	  letI : Module Γ(S, US) Γ(F, UX) := Module.compHom _ (iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom
794	  haveI : IsScalarTower Γ(S, US) Γ(X, UX) Γ(F, UX) :=
795	    IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul fun _ _ => rfl
796	  letI : Module Γ(X, UX) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
797	    Module.compHom _ (g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left).hom
798	  letI : Module Γ(T, UT) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
799	    Module.compHom _ (iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right).hom
800	  haveI : IsScalarTower Γ(X, UX) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT)
801	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
802	    IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul fun _ _ => rfl
803	  haveI : IsScalarTower Γ(T, UT) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT)
804	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
805	    IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul fun _ _ => rfl

808	  obtain ⟨⟨eqv, heqv⟩⟩ :=
809	    pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv g F hUY hUX inf_le_left
810	  have hbc : IsBaseChange Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT)
811	      (pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap g F (V := UX) inf_le_left) :=
812	    IsBaseChange.of_equiv eqv heqv
813	  exact Module.Flat.of_isPushout Γ(S, US) Γ(T, UT) Γ(X, UX)
814	    Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) Γ(F, UX) hbc

817	/-- **Per-piece finiteness transfer.**  If the `F`-sections on the affine
818	`UX ⊆ X` are finite over `Γ(X, UX)`, the pulled-back sections on the piece
819	are finite over the piece's own section ring (base change of a finite module
820	is finite). -/
821	theorem finite_section_pullback_piece (F : X.Modules) [F.IsQuasicoherent]
822	    (hUS : IsAffineOpen US) (hUT : IsAffineOpen UT) (hUX : IsAffineOpen UX)
823	    (hfin : Module.Finite Γ(X, UX) Γ(F, UX)) :
824	    Module.Finite Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT)
825	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) := by
826	  have hUY : IsAffineOpen (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
827	    isAffineOpen_pullback_piece H hUST hUSX hUS hUT hUX
828	  letI : Algebra Γ(X, UX) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
829	    (g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left).hom.toAlgebra
830	  letI : Module Γ(X, UX) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
831	    Module.compHom _ (g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left).hom
832	  obtain ⟨⟨eqv, -⟩⟩ :=
833	    pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv g F hUY hUX inf_le_left
834	  haveI : Module.Finite Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT)
835	      (TensorProduct Γ(X, UX) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) Γ(F, UX)) :=
836	    Module.Finite.base_change _ _ _
837	  exact Module.Finite.equiv eqv

841	/-! ## §5. Flatness over the base is affine-local (cover ⟹ all pairs)
842	
843	If a quasi-coherent module `G` on `Y ⟶ T` has flat sections on one family of
844	affine chart pairs `(Uc j ⊆ T, Wc j ⊆ q⁻¹Uc j)` whose fibre-side charts cover
845	`Y`, then *every* affine pair `(U, W)` has flat sections — Stacks 00HT-style
846	affine-locality, in the two-layer basic-open reduction style of
847	`flat_section_pair`: cover `W` by opens simultaneously basic in `W` and in a
848	chart, lying above base basic opens common to `U` and the chart's base
849	`Uc j`; per piece, restrict the chart flatness fibre-side (mixed-base
850	stability `Module.Flat.of_isLocalizedModule_algebra`), then exchange the base
851	ring twice (`Module.flat_iff_of_isLocalization`); glue with
852	`Module.flat_of_isLocalized_span`. -/
853	
854	section FlatAffineLocal

1018	/-! ## §6. Reduced closed subschemes and flatness transport
1019	
1020	Support facts for the Noetherian induction: the vanishing-ideal subscheme of
1021	a closed subset is reduced (its ideal sheaf is radical, so the affine cover
1022	pieces `Spec (Γ(S,U)/I(U))` are reduced); if the closed subset is
1023	irreducible, the subscheme is integral.  `coherentSheafFlat_of_iso`
1024	transports the coherent-sheaf-flatness predicate along an isomorphism of
1025	module sheaves. -/
1026	
1027	section ReducedSubscheme
1028	
1029	variable {S : Scheme.{u}}
1030	
1031	lemma support_vanishingIdeal (Z : TopologicalSpace.Closeds S) :
1032	    (Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).support = Z := by
1033	  ext1
1034	  exact Scheme.IdealSheafData.coe_support_vanishingIdeal (X := S) Z
1035	
1036	lemma radical_vanishingIdeal (Z : TopologicalSpace.Closeds S) :
1037	    (Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).radical =
1038	      Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z := by
1039	  rw [← Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal_support, support_vanishingIdeal]
1040	
1041	lemma isRadical_vanishingIdeal_ideal (Z : TopologicalSpace.Closeds S)
1042	    (U : S.affineOpens) :
1043	    ((Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).ideal U).IsRadical := by
1044	  have h := congrArg (fun I => Scheme.IdealSheafData.ideal I U)
1045	    (radical_vanishingIdeal Z)
1046	  simp only [Scheme.IdealSheafData.radical_ideal] at h
1047	  rw [← h]
1048	  exact Ideal.radical_isRadical _
1049	
1050	instance isReduced_vanishingIdeal_subscheme (Z : TopologicalSpace.Closeds S) :
1051	    IsReduced (Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).subscheme := by
1052	  haveI : ∀ U, IsReduced
1053	      ((Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).subschemeCover.openCover.X U) := by
1054	    intro U
1055	    haveI : _root_.IsReduced
1056	        (Γ(S, U.1) ⧸ (Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).ideal U) :=
1057	      (Ideal.isRadical_iff_quotient_reduced _).mp
1058	        (isRadical_vanishingIdeal_ideal Z U)
1059	    exact inferInstanceAs (IsReduced (Spec (.of
1060	      (Γ(S, U.1) ⧸ (Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).ideal U))))
1061	  exact IsReduced.of_openCover
1062	    (𝒰 := (Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).subschemeCover.openCover)
1063	
1064	lemma isIntegral_vanishingIdeal_subscheme (Z : TopologicalSpace.Closeds S)
1065	    (hZ : IsIrreducible (Z : Set S)) :
1066	    IsIntegral (Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).subscheme := by

1068	    have h : IsIrreducible
1069	        (((Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).support : Set S)) := by
1070	      rw [show (((Scheme.IdealSheafData.vanishingIdeal Z).support : Set S)) = (Z : Set S) by
1071	        rw [support_vanishingIdeal]]
1072	      exact hZ
1073	    exact Subtype.irreducibleSpace h
1074	  exact isIntegral_of_irreducibleSpace_of_isReduced _

1077	lemma coherentSheafFlat_of_iso {T' Y' : Scheme.{u}} (q : Y' ⟶ T') {G G' : Y'.Modules}
1078	    (e : G ≅ G') (h : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat q G) : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat q G' := by

1080	  letI : Module Γ(T', U) Γ(G', V) := Module.compHom _ (q.appLE U V eV).hom
1081	  letI : Module Γ(T', U) Γ(G, V) := Module.compHom _ (q.appLE U V eV).hom
1082	  haveI hG : Module.Flat Γ(T', U) Γ(G, V) := h hU hV eV
1083	  refine Module.Flat.of_linearEquiv (M := Γ(G, V)) (e := ?_)
1084	  exact
1085	    { toFun := fun x => (Scheme.Modules.Hom.app e.inv V).hom x
1086	      invFun := fun x => (Scheme.Modules.Hom.app e.hom V).hom x
1087	      left_inv := fun x => by

1107	/-! ## §7. The flat stratum over one irreducible component
1108	
1109	For an irreducible closed subset `Zc ⊆ S` with reduced subscheme `T`, generic
1110	flatness on the base-changed family `X ×_S T ⟶ T` produces a non-empty open
1111	`Ω ⊆ T` such that for *every* open `St ≤ Ω` the family restricted to the
1112	locally closed stratum `St ⟶ S` has flat pullback: chart flatness on the
1113	piece cover of `X ×_S St` comes from the generic-flatness output through the
1114	pasted pullback square (`IsPullback.of_bot`) and the per-piece transfer of
1115	§4, `flat_section_of_affine_cover` (§5) globalizes, and
1116	`coherentSheafFlat_of_iso` rewrites the pulled-back sheaf through
1117	`pullbackComp`. -/

1132	/-- **Flat stratum over an irreducible component** [Nitsure §4, induction
1133	step core].  For `Zc ⊆ S` irreducible closed with reduced subscheme `T`,
1134	there is a non-empty open `Ω ⊆ T` such that every open substratum
1135	`St ≤ Ω`, viewed as a locally closed subscheme of `S`, has flat pullback
1136	family. -/
1137	theorem flat_stratum_of_irreducible (hirr : IsIrreducible (Zc : Set S)) :
1138	    ∃ Ω : (Tsch).Opens, (Ω : Set Tsch).Nonempty ∧
1139	      ∀ St : (Tsch).Opens, St ≤ Ω →
1140	        Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (pullback.snd π (St.ι ≫ kT))
1141	          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π (St.ι ≫ kT))).obj F) := by
1142	  classical

1390	/-! ## §7b. Transport of coherent-sheaf flatness along base isomorphisms
1391	
1392	`CoherentSheafFlat` is insensitive to an isomorphism on the base leg: if a
1393	module sheaf is flat for `q ≫ w` with `w` an isomorphism of schemes, it is
1394	flat for `q`.  The section-level content is that flatness of a module
1395	transports along a factorization of the acting ring map through a bijective
1396	ring map (`Module.compHom` structures; the section module is unchanged). -/
1397	
1398	section IsoTransport
1399	
1400	/-- Flatness of a module transports along a factorization of the acting ring
1401	map through a bijective ring map: if `ψ = φ ∘ ρ` with `ρ : R →+* R'`
1402	bijective and `M` flat for the `R'`-action through `φ`, then `M` is flat for
1403	the `R`-action through `ψ`.  (`R'` is a free `R`-module of rank one via `ρ`,
1404	so this is `Module.Flat.trans` along the scalar tower `R → R' → M`.) -/
1405	private theorem flat_of_ringHom_comp_bijective {R R' O M : Type v} [CommRing R]
1406	    [CommRing R'] [CommRing O] [AddCommGroup M] [Module O M] (ρ : R →+* R')
1407	    (hρ : Function.Bijective ρ) (φ : R' →+* O) (ψ : R →+* O)
1408	    (hψ : ψ = φ.comp ρ)
1409	    (h : letI : Module R' M := Module.compHom M φ; Module.Flat R' M) :
1410	    letI : Module R M := Module.compHom M ψ; Module.Flat R M := by
1411	  subst hψ
1412	  letI : Module R' M := Module.compHom M φ
1413	  letI : Module R M := Module.compHom M (φ.comp ρ)
1414	  letI : Algebra R R' := ρ.toAlgebra
1415	  haveI : Module.Flat R' M := h
1416	  haveI : Module.Flat R R' := by
1417	    have hcoe : ⇑(Algebra.linearMap R R') = ⇑ρ := by
1418	      funext x
1419	      simp [RingHom.algebraMap_toAlgebra]
1420	    exact Module.Flat.of_linearEquiv
1421	      ((LinearEquiv.ofBijective (Algebra.linearMap R R')
1422	        (by rw [hcoe]; exact hρ)).symm)
1423	  haveI : IsScalarTower R R' M :=
1424	    ⟨fun r r' m => by
1425	      change φ (ρ r * r') • m = φ (ρ r) • (φ r' • m)
1426	      rw [map_mul, mul_smul]⟩

1468	/-! ## §8. The flattening stratification (statements moved from
1469	`FlatteningStratification.lean`)
1470	
1471	The geometric sections §3–§6 of `FlatteningStratification.lean` (Nitsure §4
1472	sub-lemmas, main theorem, universal property, curve specialisation) live here
1473	because the proof of Lemma 6 (`flatLocusReduction`) consumes
1474	`genericFlatness`, which needs the QuotScheme engine that
1475	`FlatteningStratification.lean` deliberately does not import.  Blueprint
1476	pointers are unchanged (they pin fully qualified declaration names). -/
1477	
1478	set_option maxHeartbeats 1200000 in
1479	/-- **Lemma 6 (Noetherian-induction reduction).** [Nitsure §4 general
1480	case opening]
1481	
1482	For `S` noetherian, `π : X ⟶ S` proper, and `𝓕` coherent on `X`, there
1483	exist finitely many reduced locally-closed immersions `V_i ⟶ S` with
1484	pairwise disjoint set-theoretic images covering `|S|`, such that the
1485	pullback `𝓕|_{X ×_S V_i}` is flat over `V_i`.
1486	
1487	Nitsure's proof: peel off non-empty open flat patches by
1488	`genericFlatness` applied to each irreducible component (with its
1489	reduced subscheme structure), induct on the closed complement
1490	`S ∖ V` (which is again noetherian, hence the induction terminates by
1491	Noetherianity).
1492	
1493	The substantive content over the special case (Lemma 5) is that the
1494	strata `V_i` are *reduced* and that `𝓕` becomes flat above them (not
1495	merely that strata exist); the polynomial-indexed refinement of the
1496	main theorem (`flatteningStratification`) requires further assembly
1497	(`flatLocusAssembly`).
1498	
1499	Statement repair (run 0010, T12 r5): the hypothesis is `IsNoetherian S`
1500	(Nitsure's "noetherian"), not merely `IsLocallyNoetherian S` as the
1501	iter-176 skeleton had it.  With only local noetherianity the *finite*
1502	family is impossible: on `S = ⊔_{n≥1} 𝔸ⁿ` give component `n` the coherent
1503	sheaf `⊕_{k≤n} (i_{V_k})_* 𝓞_{V_k}` for a strictly nested flag
1504	`V_1 ⊃ ⋯ ⊃ V_n`; a flat locally-closed stratum through the generic point
1505	`η_k` of `V_k` cannot contain `η_{k'}` for `k' ≠ k` (near `η_{k'}` every
1506	neighbourhood meets the dense lower level, so `T ∩ V_{k'}` is not open in
1507	`T`, contradicting the clopen-support criterion for local freeness), so
1508	component `n` needs at least `n + 1` strata and no finite family covers
1509	all components.  The same strengthening applies to every finite-strata
1510	statement below (`flatLocusAssembly`, `flatteningStratification`,
1511	`flatteningStratification_universal`, `.ofCurve`); the ℕ-indexed `n = 0`
1512	special case (Lemma 5) is correct for locally noetherian `S` because the
1513	fibre rank provides the global countable index.
1514	
1515	PROVED (run 0010, T12 r6): well-founded induction on the closed target
1516	(`WellFoundedLT (Closeds S)` from noetherianity).  For non-empty `Z`,
1517	each irreducible component (imaged in `S`, with reduced subscheme
1518	structure from `vanishingIdeal`) receives a flat relatively open stratum
1519	from `flat_stratum_of_irreducible`, shrunk to avoid the other components;
1520	the union of these strata is relatively open and dense in `Z`, so its
1521	closed complement is strictly smaller and the induction terminates. -/
1522	theorem flatLocusReduction {S X : Scheme.{u}} [IsNoetherian S]
1523	    (π : X ⟶ S) [IsProper π] (F : X.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
1524	    ∃ (I : Type u) (_ : Finite I) (V_ : I → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ i, V_ i ⟶ S),
1525	      (∀ i, IsImmersion (ι i)) ∧
1526	      (∀ i j, i ≠ j → Disjoint (Set.range (ι i).base) (Set.range (ι j).base)) ∧
1527	      (∀ s : S, ∃ i, s ∈ Set.range (ι i).base) ∧
1528	      (∀ i, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (pullback.snd π (ι i))
1529	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π (ι i))).obj F)) := by
1530	  classical
1531	  suffices H : ∀ Z : TopologicalSpace.Closeds S,
1532	      ∃ (I : Type u) (_ : Finite I) (V_ : I → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ i, V_ i ⟶ S),
1533	        (∀ i, IsImmersion (ι i)) ∧
1534	        (∀ i j, i ≠ j → Disjoint (Set.range (ι i).base) (Set.range (ι j).base)) ∧
1535	        (⋃ i, Set.range (ι i).base) = (Z : Set S) ∧
1536	        (∀ i, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (pullback.snd π (ι i))
1537	          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π (ι i))).obj F)) by
1538	    obtain ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, h1, h2, h3, h4⟩ := H ⊤
1539	    refine ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, h1, h2, fun s => ?_, h4⟩
1540	    have hs : s ∈ (⋃ i, Set.range (ι i).base) := by
1541	      rw [h3]; trivial
1542	    exact Set.mem_iUnion.mp hs
1543	  intro Z₀
1544	  haveI : TopologicalSpace.NoetherianSpace S := inferInstance
1545	  induction Z₀ using WellFoundedLT.induction with | ind Z IH => ?_
1546	  by_cases hZ : (Z : Set S) = ∅
1547	  · refine ⟨PEmpty.{u+1}, inferInstance, fun i => i.elim, fun i => i.elim,
1548	      fun i => i.elim, fun i j _ => i.elim, ?_, fun i => i.elim⟩
1549	    rw [hZ]
1550	    exact Set.iUnion_of_empty _
1551	  have hZne : (Z : Set S).Nonempty := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hZ
1552	  -- the finitely many irreducible components of `Z`, imaged in `S`
1553	  haveI hNZ : TopologicalSpace.NoetherianSpace ↥(Z : Set S) :=
1554	    TopologicalSpace.NoetherianSpace.set _
1555	  have hfinC : (irreducibleComponents ↥(Z : Set S)).Finite :=
1556	    TopologicalSpace.NoetherianSpace.finite_irreducibleComponents

1758	/-- **Lemma 7 (assembly via direct images).** [Nitsure §4 assembly step]
1759	
1760	For `S` noetherian and `𝓕` coherent on a proper `π : X ⟶ S`, there
1761	exists an integer `N` such that iterating the `n=0` stratification
1762	(Lemma 5) on the direct images `E_i := π_*𝓕(N+i)` on `S`
1763	(`i = 0, 1, …`) produces, after finitely many refinements, the
1764	Hilbert-polynomial-indexed stratification of the main theorem.
1765	
1766	The substantive content is the existence of the uniform vanishing
1767	bound `N` together with the finite refinement chain producing the
1768	locally-closed strata `S_f` from the rank-strata `W_{e_0, …, e_n}`.
1769	
1770	For the iter-176 file-skeleton this is encoded by the existence of a
1771	finite locally-closed stratification refining Lemma 6, together with
1772	the assertion that the strata carry constant Hilbert polynomial (the
1773	"polynomial-locally-constant" content of Nitsure's statement (A)).
1774	The Hilbert polynomial itself is encoded abstractly as a function
1775	`I → (ℕ → ℤ)` (each numerical polynomial restricted to `ℕ`); the
1776	substantive refinement to `numericalPolynomial` of degree `≤ n` is
1777	iter-177+ work.
1778	
1779	Proof status (run 0010, T12 r2): as typed, the `P`-conjunct only demands
1780	*some* injection `I → (ℕ → ℤ)`, which any finite index type admits; the
1781	statement is therefore a formal corollary of `flatLocusReduction`, and is
1782	proved as such below. The genuinely-Hilbert-indexed refinement must
1783	strengthen the statement (tie `P f` to fibre Euler characteristics), which
1784	awaits the coherent-χ substrate. -/
1785	lemma flatLocusAssembly {S X : Scheme.{u}} [IsNoetherian S]
1786	    (π : X ⟶ S) [IsProper π] (F : X.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
1787	    ∃ (I : Type u) (_ : Finite I) (S_ : I → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ f, S_ f ⟶ S)
1788	      (P : I → ℕ → ℤ),
1789	      (∀ f, IsImmersion (ι f)) ∧
1790	      (∀ f g, f ≠ g → Disjoint (Set.range (ι f).base) (Set.range (ι g).base)) ∧
1791	      (∀ s : S, ∃ f, s ∈ Set.range (ι f).base) ∧
1792	      (∀ f, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (pullback.snd π (ι f))
1793	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π (ι f))).obj F)) ∧
1794	      (∀ f g, f = g ↔ P f = P g) := by
1795	  obtain ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, himm, hdisj, hcov, hflat⟩ := flatLocusReduction π F
1796	  haveI := hI
1797	  haveI := Fintype.ofFinite I
1798	  refine ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, fun i _ => ((Fintype.equivFin I) i : ℤ), himm, hdisj, hcov, hflat,
1799	    fun f g => ⟨fun h => h ▸ rfl, fun h => ?_⟩⟩
1800	  have h0 : (((Fintype.equivFin I) f : ℕ) : ℤ) = (((Fintype.equivFin I) g : ℕ) : ℤ) :=
1801	    congrFun h 0
1802	  exact (Fintype.equivFin I).injective (Fin.val_injective (by exact_mod_cast h0))
1803

1018	/-- Let `P` be a predicate on the affine open sets of `X` satisfying
1019	1. If `P` holds on `U`, then `P` holds on the basic open set of every section on `U`.
1020	2. If `P` holds for a family of basic open sets covering `U`, then `P` holds for `U`.
1021	3. There exists an affine open cover of `X` each satisfying `P`.
1022	
1023	Then `P` holds for every affine open of `X`.

815	def resLEStalkMap (x : V) :

421	/-- The heterobasic version of `assoc` coincides with the regular version. -/
422	theorem assoc_eq : assoc R R R M P Q = TensorProduct.assoc R M P Q := rfl
423	
424	theorem rTensor_tensor [Module R P'] [IsScalarTower R A P'] (g : P →ₗ[A] P') :
425	    g.rTensor (M ⊗[R] N) =
426	      assoc R A A P' M N ∘ₗ map (g.rTensor M) id ∘ₗ (assoc R A A P M N).symm.toLinearMap :=
427	  TensorProduct.ext <| LinearMap.ext fun _ ↦ ext fun _ _ ↦ rfl
428	
429	end assoc
430	
431	section cancelBaseChange
432	variable [Algebra A B] [IsScalarTower A B M]
433	
434	/-- `B`-linear equivalence between `M ⊗[A] (A ⊗[R] N)` and `M ⊗[R] N`.
435	In particular useful with `B = A`. -/
436	def cancelBaseChange : M ⊗[A] (A ⊗[R] N) ≃ₗ[B] M ⊗[R] N :=
437	  letI g : (M ⊗[A] A) ⊗[R] N ≃ₗ[B] M ⊗[R] N := congr (AlgebraTensorModule.rid A B M) (.refl R N)
438	  (assoc R A B M A N).symm ≪≫ₗ g
439	
440	/-- Base change distributes over tensor product. -/
441	def distribBaseChange : A ⊗[R] (N ⊗[R] Q) ≃ₗ[A] (A ⊗[R] N) ⊗[A] (A ⊗[R] Q) :=
442	  (cancelBaseChange _ _ _ _ _ ≪≫ₗ assoc _ _ _ _ _ _).symm
443	
444	variable {M P N Q}
445	
446	@[simp]
447	theorem cancelBaseChange_tmul (m : M) (n : N) (a : A) :
448	    cancelBaseChange R A B M N (m ⊗ₜ (a ⊗ₜ n)) = (a • m) ⊗ₜ n :=
449	  rfl
450	
451	@[simp]
452	theorem cancelBaseChange_symm_tmul (m : M) (n : N) :
453	    (cancelBaseChange R A B M N).symm (m ⊗ₜ n) = m ⊗ₜ (1 ⊗ₜ n) :=
454	  rfl
455	
456	theorem lTensor_comp_cancelBaseChange (f : N →ₗ[R] Q) :
457	    lTensor _ _ f ∘ₗ cancelBaseChange R A B M N =
458	      (cancelBaseChange R A B M Q).toLinearMap ∘ₗ lTensor _ _ (lTensor _ _ f) := by
459	  ext; simp
460	
461	@[simp]
462	theorem distribBaseChange_tmul (n : N) (q : Q) (a : A) :
463	    distribBaseChange R A N Q (a ⊗ₜ (n ⊗ₜ q)) = (a ⊗ₜ n) ⊗ₜ (1 ⊗ₜ q) :=
464	  rfl

720	/-- The piece `g⁻¹UX ⊓ iY⁻¹UT` of a fibre-product square over affine opens is
721	affine: it is isomorphic to the pullback of the restricted affine cospan
722	(`Scheme.Hom.isPullback_resLE`). -/
723	theorem isAffineOpen_pullback_piece (hUS : IsAffineOpen US) (hUT : IsAffineOpen UT)
724	    (hUX : IsAffineOpen UX) : IsAffineOpen (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) := by
725	  have : IsAffine US := hUS
726	  have : IsAffine UT := hUT
727	  have : IsAffine UX := hUX
728	  exact IsAffine.of_isIso (Scheme.Hom.isPullback_resLE H hUST hUSX rfl).isoPullback.hom
729	
730	/-- The section-ring square of a fibre-product square at an affine piece is a
731	pushout in `CommRingCat` (Mathlib's `isIso_pushoutSection_of_isAffineOpen`,
732	repackaged). -/
733	theorem isPushout_appLE_pullback_piece (hUS : IsAffineOpen US) (hUT : IsAffineOpen UT)
734	    (hUX : IsAffineOpen UX) :
735	    CategoryTheory.IsPushout (iX.appLE US UX hUSX) (f.appLE US UT hUST)
736	      (g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left)
737	      (iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right) :=
738	  (isIso_pushoutSection_iff H hUST hUSX rfl).mp
739	    (isIso_pushoutSection_of_isAffineOpen H hUST hUSX rfl hUS hUT hUX)
740	
741	set_option maxSynthPendingDepth 3 in
742	/-- **Per-piece flatness transfer.**  If the `F`-sections on the affine
743	`UX ⊆ X` are flat over the affine `US ⊆ S`, then for any affine `UT ⊆ T`
744	above `US`, the pulled-back sections on the piece `g⁻¹UX ⊓ iY⁻¹UT ⊆ Y` are
745	flat over `UT`.  This is `Module.Flat.of_isPushout` (§3) fed with the ring
746	pushout of `isPushout_appLE_pullback_piece` and the Lane F base-change
747	section formula. -/
748	theorem flat_section_pullback_piece (F : X.Modules) [F.IsQuasicoherent]
749	    (hUS : IsAffineOpen US) (hUT : IsAffineOpen UT) (hUX : IsAffineOpen UX)
750	    (hflat :
751	      letI : Module Γ(S, US) Γ(F, UX) := Module.compHom _ (iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom
752	      Module.Flat Γ(S, US) Γ(F, UX)) :
753	    letI : Module Γ(T, UT) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
754	      Module.compHom _ (iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right).hom
755	    Module.Flat Γ(T, UT) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj F, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) := by
756	  have hUY : IsAffineOpen (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
757	    isAffineOpen_pullback_piece H hUST hUSX hUS hUT hUX
758	  -- ring algebra structures on the four corners
759	  letI : Algebra Γ(S, US) Γ(X, UX) := (iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom.toAlgebra
760	  letI : Algebra Γ(S, US) Γ(T, UT) := (f.appLE US UT hUST).hom.toAlgebra
761	  letI : Algebra Γ(X, UX) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
762	    (g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left).hom.toAlgebra
763	  letI : Algebra Γ(T, UT) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
764	    (iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right).hom.toAlgebra
765	  letI : Algebra Γ(S, US) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
766	    ((g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left).hom.comp
767	      (iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom).toAlgebra
768	  haveI : IsScalarTower Γ(S, US) Γ(X, UX) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
769	    IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq' rfl
770	  haveI : IsScalarTower Γ(S, US) Γ(T, UT) Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
771	    IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq' (by
772	      show ((g.appLE UX _ inf_le_left).hom.comp (iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom) =
773	        (iY.appLE UT _ inf_le_right).hom.comp (f.appLE US UT hUST).hom
774	      have key : ∀ (φ : Y ⟶ S) (_ : iY ≫ f = φ)
775	          (w₁ : (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) ≤ φ ⁻¹ᵁ US)
776	          (w₂ : (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) ≤ (iY ≫ f) ⁻¹ᵁ US),
777	          φ.appLE US (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) w₁ =
778	            (iY ≫ f).appLE US (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) w₂ := by
779	        rintro φ rfl w₁ w₂; rfl
780	      have h1 : iX.appLE US UX hUSX ≫ g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left =
781	          f.appLE US UT hUST ≫ iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right := by
782	        rw [Scheme.Hom.appLE_comp_appLE, Scheme.Hom.appLE_comp_appLE]
783	        exact key (g ≫ iX) H.w.symm _ _
784	      exact congrArg CommRingCat.Hom.hom h1)
785	  -- the pushout of section rings, in `Algebra.IsPushout` form
786	  haveI hpo₁ : Algebra.IsPushout Γ(S, US) Γ(X, UX) Γ(T, UT)
787	      Γ(Y, g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) :=
788	    CommRingCat.isPushout_iff_isPushout.mp
789	      (isPushout_appLE_pullback_piece H hUST hUSX hUS hUT hUX)

1804	/-- **Flattening stratification existence theorem** [Nitsure §4 main /
1805	Stacks 052H].
1806	
1807	For a noetherian scheme `S`, a proper morphism `π : X ⟶ S`, and a
1808	coherent `𝓞_X`-module `𝓕`, there exists a finite locally-closed
1809	stratification `{S_f}` of `S` indexed by a finite set `I` such that
1810	- each `ι : S_f ⟶ S` is a (locally-closed) immersion;
1811	- the underlying sets `|S_f|` partition `|S|` (disjoint and covering);
1812	- the pullback `𝓕|_{X ×_S S_f}` is flat over `S_f` for each `f`.
1813	
1814	The (intended) substantive refinement is that the index set `I` is in
1815	bijection with the set of Hilbert polynomials arising on fibres, and
1816	that each `S_f` is uniquely determined by its Hilbert polynomial. For
1817	the iter-176 file-skeleton the substantive type captures the
1818	stratification + flatness; the Hilbert-polynomial labeling is encoded
1819	in `flatLocusAssembly`'s `P : I → ℕ → ℤ` injection but elided here for
1820	type-clarity.
1821	
1822	Proof status (run 0010, T12 r2): the conclusion as typed is exactly the
1823	conclusion of `flatLocusReduction` (Lemma 6) up to conjunct order, so the
1824	theorem is proved below by that reduction; the remaining mathematical
1825	content of this cone therefore lives in `flatLocusReduction` (Noetherian
1826	induction on `genericFlatness`) and `genericFlatness` itself. The
1827	Hilbert-polynomial-indexed refinement (which would need relative
1828	projective space `ℙⁿ_S`, Castelnuovo–Mumford regularity, direct-image
1829	base change 02KH) is deliberately not part of this statement; see
1830	`flatLocusAssembly` and the blueprint chapter §`Mathlib status`. -/
1831	theorem flatteningStratification {S X : Scheme.{u}} [IsNoetherian S]
1832	    (π : X ⟶ S) [IsProper π] (F : X.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
1833	    ∃ (I : Type u) (_ : Finite I) (S_ : I → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ f, S_ f ⟶ S),
1834	      (∀ f, IsImmersion (ι f)) ∧
1835	      (∀ s : S, ∃ f, s ∈ Set.range (ι f).base) ∧
1836	      (∀ f g, f ≠ g → Disjoint (Set.range (ι f).base) (Set.range (ι g).base)) ∧
1837	      (∀ f, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (pullback.snd π (ι f))
1838	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π (ι f))).obj F)) := by
1839	  obtain ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, himm, hdisj, hcov, hflat⟩ := flatLocusReduction π F
1840	  exact ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, himm, hcov, hdisj, hflat⟩
1841	
1842	/-- **Lemma 5 (special case `n = 0`).** [Nitsure §4 special case]
1843	
1844	For `S` noetherian and `𝓕` a coherent `𝓞_S`-module, there exists a
1845	countable family `S_e ⊆ S` (indexed by `e ∈ ℕ`) of locally-closed
1846	subschemes such that
1847	- each `S_e ⟶ S` is a (locally-closed) immersion;
1848	- the underlying sets `|S_e|` partition `|S|`;
1849	- the pullback `𝓕|_{S_e}` is flat over `𝓞_{S_e}` — encoded as
1850	  `CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (S_ e))`, i.e. flatness of the section modules of
1851	  the pulled-back sheaf over the section rings of the stratum *itself*.
1852	  (The *rank*-`e` locally-free refinement is future work once the
1853	  locally-free-of-rank-`e` predicate is in scope.)
1854	
1855	Statement repair (run 0010, T12 r2): the former conclusion asserted
1856	`CoherentSheafFlat (ι e)` — flatness of the pulled-back sheaf over the
1857	*ambient* `S` via the immersion — which is FALSE for any non-open stratum
1858	(the rank stratification of the skyscraper `k(0)` on `𝔸¹` refutes it);
1859	Nitsure's content is flatness (indeed local freeness) over the stratum,
1860	which is `CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (S_ e))`.
1861	
1862	Statement repair (run 0010, T12 r7): hypothesis strengthened from
1863	`IsLocallyNoetherian` to `IsNoetherian`, matching the standing noetherian
1864	assumption of [Nitsure] §4.  With the rank-`e` labeling dropped (previous
1865	repair) the strata are no longer canonical, so the gluing argument that
1866	would extend the ℕ-indexed statement to a merely locally noetherian base
1867	(canonical rank strata glue over any affine cover) is not available to this
1868	statement; the noetherian form is what the `AJC.picrep` cone consumes.
1869	
1870	Proof (run 0010, T12 r7): from the existence theorem
1871	`flatteningStratification` applied to `π = 𝟙 S`.  The finitely many strata
1872	`V_f` are re-indexed over `ℕ` via `Fintype.equivFin`, with the *pullback
1873	scheme* `(𝟙 S) ×_S V_f` itself as stratum and `pullback.fst` as the
1874	immersion (equal to `pullback.snd ≫ ι f` with `pullback.snd` an
1875	isomorphism, since `𝟙 S` is), padded by the empty scheme for indices
1876	`≥ card I`.  Flatness over the stratum transports from the conclusion of
1877	`flatteningStratification` by `coherentSheafFlat_of_comp_isIso`, and over
1878	the empty scheme every section module is flat (the section rings are
1879	trivial). -/
1880	lemma flatLocusStratification {S : Scheme.{u}} [IsNoetherian S]
1881	    (F : S.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
1882	    ∃ (S_ : ℕ → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ e, S_ e ⟶ S),
1883	      (∀ e, IsImmersion (ι e)) ∧
1884	      (∀ e e', e ≠ e' → Disjoint (Set.range (ι e).base) (Set.range (ι e').base)) ∧
1885	      (∀ s : S, ∃ e, s ∈ Set.range (ι e).base) ∧
1886	      (∀ e, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (S_ e))
1887	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (ι e)).obj F)) := by
1888	  classical
1889	  haveI : IsProper (𝟙 S) := MorphismProperty.id_mem _ S
1890	  obtain ⟨I, hI, V_, ι₀, himm, hcov, hdisj, hflat⟩ := flatteningStratification (𝟙 S) F
1891	  haveI := hI
1892	  haveI := Fintype.ofFinite I
1893	  let eqv := Fintype.equivFin I
1894	  -- the first projection is the composition of the iso `pullback.snd` with `ι₀`
1895	  have hfst : ∀ i : I,
1896	      pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i) = pullback.snd (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i) ≫ ι₀ i := fun i => by
1897	    simpa using pullback.condition (f := 𝟙 S) (g := ι₀ i)
1898	  have hrange : ∀ i : I,
1899	      Set.range (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i)).base = Set.range (ι₀ i).base := by
1900	    intro i
1901	    have hsurj : Function.Surjective (pullback.snd (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i)).base :=
1902	      (ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (pullback.snd (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i)).base).2
1903	    rw [hfst i]
1904	    simp only [Scheme.Hom.comp_base, TopCat.coe_comp, Set.range_comp]
1905	    rw [hsurj.range_eq, Set.image_univ]
1906	  -- reindex the finite strata over `ℕ`, padding with the empty scheme
1907	  let P : ℕ → Σ X : Scheme.{u}, X ⟶ S := fun e =>
1908	    if h : e < Fintype.card I then
1909	      ⟨pullback (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)),
1910	        pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩))⟩
1911	    else ⟨∅, Scheme.emptyTo S⟩
1912	  -- the branch values of `P`, as equalities of the full dependent pair (the
1913	  -- `dite` cannot be reduced under the projections: the motive would not be
1914	  -- type-correct)
1915	  have hPpos : ∀ (e : ℕ) (h : e < Fintype.card I),
1916	      P e = ⟨pullback (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)),
1917	        pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩))⟩ := fun e h => dif_pos h
1918	  have hPneg : ∀ (e : ℕ), ¬ e < Fintype.card I →
1919	      P e = ⟨∅, Scheme.emptyTo S⟩ := fun e h => dif_neg h
1920	  refine ⟨fun e => (P e).1, fun e => (P e).2, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
1921	  · -- immersions
1922	    intro e
1923	    change IsImmersion (P e).2
1924	    by_cases h : e < Fintype.card I
1925	    · rw [hPpos e h]
1926	      change IsImmersion (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)))
1927	      haveI := himm (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)
1928	      rw [hfst (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)]
1929	      infer_instance
1930	    · rw [hPneg e h]
1931	      change IsImmersion (Scheme.emptyTo S)
1932	      infer_instance
1933	  · -- disjoint ranges
1934	    intro e e' hne
1935	    change Disjoint (Set.range (P e).2.base) (Set.range (P e').2.base)
1936	    by_cases h : e < Fintype.card I
1937	    · by_cases h' : e' < Fintype.card I
1938	      · rw [hPpos e h, hPpos e' h']
1939	        change Disjoint
1940	          (Set.range (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩))).base)
1941	          (Set.range (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e', h'⟩))).base)
1942	        rw [hrange _, hrange _]
1943	        refine hdisj _ _ fun hcontra => hne ?_
1944	        have h2 := congrArg eqv hcontra
1945	        rw [Equiv.apply_symm_apply, Equiv.apply_symm_apply] at h2
1946	        exact congrArg Fin.val h2
1947	      · rw [hPneg e' h']
1948	        change Disjoint (Set.range (P e).2.base) (Set.range (Scheme.emptyTo S).base)
1949	        rw [Set.range_eq_empty (Scheme.emptyTo S).base]
1950	        exact Set.disjoint_empty _
1951	    · rw [hPneg e h]
1952	      change Disjoint (Set.range (Scheme.emptyTo S).base) (Set.range (P e').2.base)
1953	      rw [Set.range_eq_empty (Scheme.emptyTo S).base]
1954	      exact Set.empty_disjoint _
1955	  · -- covering
1956	    intro s

2003	0010 T12 r7) is recorded in the docstring there. -/
2004	
2005	/-- **Flattening stratification for a coherent sheaf on a relative
2006	curve** [Nitsure §4 corollary; Route~A consumer A.2.a entry-point].
2007	
2008	Let `k` be a field, `C` a smooth proper curve over `k` (encoded as
2009	`C : Over (Spec k)` with `[SmoothOfRelativeDimension 1 C.hom]` and
2010	`[IsProper C.hom]`), and `T` a noetherian `k`-scheme. For any coherent
2011	sheaf `𝓕` on the relative curve `C ×_k T`, the flattening
2012	stratification conclusion of `flatteningStratification` applies to
2013	`π = pr_T : C ×_k T → T` and `𝓕`: there is a finite locally-closed
2014	stratification `{T_f ⊆ T}` set-theoretically covering `T` disjointly,

2018	morphism `pullback.snd C.hom T.hom : (C ×_k T) ⟶ T`, using that
2019	`IsProper (pullback.snd C.hom T.hom)` holds by base change of
2020	`IsProper C.hom`; hence this corollary is proved (no `sorry`). -/
2021	theorem flatteningStratification.ofCurve {k : Type u} [Field k]
2022	    (C : Over (Spec (.of k)))
2023	    [SmoothOfRelativeDimension 1 C.hom] [IsProper C.hom]
2024	    (T : Over (Spec (.of k))) [IsNoetherian T.left]
2025	    (F : (Limits.pullback C.hom T.hom).Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
2026	    ∃ (I : Type u) (_ : Finite I) (T_ : I → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ f, T_ f ⟶ T.left),
2027	      (∀ f, IsImmersion (ι f)) ∧
2028	      (∀ t : T.left, ∃ f, t ∈ Set.range (ι f).base) ∧
2029	      (∀ f g, f ≠ g → Disjoint (Set.range (ι f).base) (Set.range (ι g).base)) ∧
2030	      (∀ f, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat
2031	        (pullback.snd (pullback.snd C.hom T.hom) (ι f))
2032	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback
2033	          (pullback.fst (pullback.snd C.hom T.hom) (ι f))).obj F)) :=
2034	  flatteningStratification (pullback.snd C.hom T.hom) F
2035	
2036	end AlgebraicGeometry

/-- The over-restriction transport of presentations preserves finiteness:
`presentationOverOpens` is a chain of two `Presentation.map`s and one
`Presentation.ofIsIso`. -/
instance presentationOverOpens_isFinite {X : Scheme.{u}} (W : X.Opens)
    (M : X.Modules) (U : X.Opens) (P : (M.over U).Presentation) (hWU : W ≤ U)
    [P.IsFinite] : (presentationOverOpens W M U P hWU).IsFinite := by
  delta presentationOverOpens
  infer_instance

/-- The restriction-from-over transport of presentations preserves finiteness:
`presentationRestrictOfOver` is `presentationOverOpens` followed by a
`Presentation.map` and a `Presentation.ofIsIso`. -/
instance presentationRestrictOfOver_isFinite {X : Scheme.{u}} (W : X.Opens)
    (M : X.Modules) (U : X.Opens) (P : (M.over U).Presentation) (hWU : W ≤ U)
    [P.IsFinite] : (presentationRestrictOfOver W M U P hWU).IsFinite := by

479	  (`def:hilbert_polynomial`) *is* `Φ`, and it excludes the junk-value
480	  coincidence when no polynomial matches. -/
481	structure QuotFamily (π : X ⟶ S) [LocallyOfFiniteType π] (L E : X.Modules)
482	    (Φ : Polynomial ℚ) (T : Over S) : Type (u + 1) where
483	  /-- The quotient sheaf on the relative product `X ×_S T`. -/
484	  F : (Limits.pullback π T.hom).Modules
485	  /-- `F` is finitely presented (coherent, in the locally noetherian regime). -/
486	  isFinitePresentation : F.IsFinitePresentation
487	  /-- `F` is flat over `T`. -/
488	  flat : CoherentSheafFlat (pullback.snd π T.hom) F
489	  /-- The schematic support of `F` is proper over `T`. -/
490	  properSupport : Modules.HasProperSupport (pullback.snd π T.hom) F
491	  /-- The quotient map from the pullback of `E`. -/
492	  q : (Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π T.hom)).obj E ⟶ F
493	  /-- The quotient map is an epimorphism. -/
494	  epi : Epi q
495	  /-- At every `t : T`, the graded Hilbert function of the fibre of `F`
496	  twisted by `L` eventually agrees with `Φ`. -/
497	  hilb : ∀ t : (T.left : Scheme.{u}), ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ m : ℕ, N < m →
498	    Φ.eval (m : ℚ) = (hilbertFunction (pullback.snd π T.hom)
499	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π T.hom)).obj L) F t m : ℚ)
500	
501	namespace QuotFamily
502	
503	variable {π : X ⟶ S} [LocallyOfFiniteType π] {L E : X.Modules} {Φ : Polynomial ℚ}
504	
505	/- The quasi-coherence of the twisting module `L` (part of the line-bundle
506	hypothesis of `def:quot_functor`) enters only through the base-change
507	invariance of the fibrewise Hilbert function
508	(`Scheme.hilbertFunction_quotBaseMap`), i.e. through the pullback action. -/
509	
510	/-- Two families of quotients are **equivalent** when an isomorphism of the
511	target sheaves commutes with the quotient maps — equivalently, when
512	`ker q = ker q'` (`def:quot_functor`; same convention as the merged absolute
513	Grassmannian `RankQuotient.Rel`). -/
514	def Rel {T : Over S} (x y : QuotFamily π L E Φ T) : Prop :=
515	  ∃ f : x.F ≅ y.F, x.q ≫ f.hom = y.q
516	
517	lemma rel_refl {T : Over S} (x : QuotFamily π L E Φ T) : x.Rel x :=
518	  ⟨Iso.refl _, Category.comp_id _⟩
519	
520	lemma rel_symm {T : Over S} {x y : QuotFamily π L E Φ T} (h : x.Rel y) : y.Rel x := by
521	  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
522	  exact ⟨f.symm, by rw [Iso.symm_hom, Iso.comp_inv_eq]; exact hf.symm⟩
523	
524	lemma rel_trans {T : Over S} {x y z : QuotFamily π L E Φ T}
525	    (h1 : x.Rel y) (h2 : y.Rel z) : x.Rel z := by
526	  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h1; obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := h2
527	  exact ⟨f ≪≫ g,
528	    (congrArg (x.q ≫ ·) (Iso.trans_hom f g)).trans <|
529	      (Category.assoc x.q f.hom g.hom).symm.trans <|
530	        (congrArg (· ≫ g.hom) hf).trans hg⟩
531	
532	/-- The equivalence-of-families setoid. -/
533	instance setoid (π : X ⟶ S) [LocallyOfFiniteType π] (L E : X.Modules)
534	    (Φ : Polynomial ℚ) (T : Over S) : Setoid (QuotFamily π L E Φ T) where
535	  r := Rel
536	  iseqv := ⟨rel_refl, rel_symm, rel_trans⟩
537	
538	/-- The **pullback action** on a family of quotients along `ψ : T' ⟶ T` of
539	`Over S`: pull the sheaf and the quotient map back along
540	`quotBaseMap π ψ : X_{T'} ⟶ X_T`, matching the `E`-side through
541	`pullbackTriangleIso (quotBaseMap_fst π ψ)`.  Well-definedness of the four
542	conditions is the content of §2. -/
543	noncomputable def pullbackAlong [L.IsQuasicoherent] {T T' : Over S} (ψ : T' ⟶ T)
544	    (x : QuotFamily π L E Φ T) : QuotFamily π L E Φ T' where
545	  F := (Scheme.Modules.pullback (quotBaseMap π ψ)).obj x.F
546	  isFinitePresentation :=
547	    Modules.pullback_isFinitePresentation _ x.F x.isFinitePresentation
548	  flat := fun {U} hU {V} hV e =>
549	    CoherentSheafFlat.of_isPullback (quotBaseSquare π ψ) x.F
550	      (letI := x.isFinitePresentation; inferInstance) x.flat hU hV e
551	  properSupport :=
552	    Modules.HasProperSupport.of_isPullback (quotBaseSquare π ψ) x.F
553	      x.isFinitePresentation x.properSupport
554	  q := (pullbackTriangleIso (quotBaseMap_fst π ψ) E).inv ≫

150	private lemma id_appLE_apply {W : T.Opens}
151	    (e : W ≤ (𝟙 T : T ⟶ T) ⁻¹ᵁ W) (r : Γ(T, W)) :
152	    ((𝟙 T : T ⟶ T).appLE W W e).hom r = r := by
153	  rw [Scheme.id_appLE]
154	  exact presheaf_map_self (X := T) e r
155	
156	/-- **Extraction of section flatness from flatness over the identity**: if
157	`G` is flat over `T` via `𝟙 T` (the encoding of "the coherent sheaf `G` is
158	flat" in `Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat`), then the sections over every affine
159	open form a flat module over the section ring. -/
160	theorem flat_sections_of_coherentSheafFlat_id {G : T.Modules}
161	    (h : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T) G) {W : T.Opens}
162	    (hW : IsAffineOpen W) : Module.Flat Γ(T, W) Γ(G, W) :=
163	  (flat_compHom_congr ((𝟙 T : T ⟶ T).appLE W W (le_refl W)).hom
164	    (id_appLE_apply _)).mp (h hW hW (le_refl W))
165	
166	/-- **Flatness over the identity from an affine cover of flat sections**:
167	if the sections of `G` over each member of an affine open cover of `T` are
168	flat over the respective section rings, then `G` is flat over `T` via
169	`𝟙 T`. -/
170	theorem coherentSheafFlat_id_of_charts (G : T.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent]
171	    {ι : Type u} (Wc : ι → T.Opens) (hWc : ∀ j, IsAffineOpen (Wc j))
172	    (hcover : ∀ y : T, ∃ j, y ∈ Wc j)
173	    (hflat : ∀ j, Module.Flat Γ(T, Wc j) Γ(G, Wc j)) :
174	    Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T) G := by
175	  intro U hU V hV eV
176	  exact flat_section_of_affine_cover (𝟙 T) G Wc hWc Wc hWc
177	    (fun j => le_refl _) hcover
178	    (fun j => (flat_compHom_congr
179	      ((𝟙 T : T ⟶ T).appLE (Wc j) (Wc j) (le_refl _)).hom
180	      (id_appLE_apply _)).mpr (hflat j)) hU hV eV
181	
182	end FlatBridge
183	
184	/-! ## §2 The rank dictionary -/
185	
186	section RankDictionary
187	
188	variable {T : Scheme.{u}} (G : T.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent]
189	
190	/-- A prime of the section ring of an affine open is the prime ideal of
191	the corresponding point. -/
192	private lemma primeIdealOf_fromSpec {W : T.Opens} (hW : IsAffineOpen W)
193	    (p : PrimeSpectrum Γ(T, W)) (hmem : (hW.fromSpec p : T) ∈ W) :
194	    hW.primeIdealOf ⟨hW.fromSpec p, hmem⟩ = p := by
195	  have hinj : Function.Injective hW.fromSpec :=
196	    hW.fromSpec.isOpenEmbedding.injective
197	  exact hinj (by rw [hW.fromSpec_primeIdealOf])
198	
199	/-- **The stalk rank of an affine section module computes the point rank**:
200	for a quasi-coherent `G` with flat, finite sections `Γ(G, W)` over an
201	affine `W`, the rank of `Γ(G, W)` at a prime `p` is the point rank of `G`
202	at the corresponding point `fromSpec p` [Nitsure §4: flatness plus finite
203	presentation make the fibre dimension compute the local rank]. -/
204	theorem rankAtStalk_sections_eq_pointRank {W : T.Opens}
205	    (hW : IsAffineOpen W) [Module.Flat Γ(T, W) Γ(G, W)]
206	    [Module.Finite Γ(T, W) Γ(G, W)] (p : PrimeSpectrum Γ(T, W)) :
207	    Module.rankAtStalk Γ(G, W) p = pointRank T G (hW.fromSpec p) := by
208	  have hmem : (hW.fromSpec p : T) ∈ W := by
209	    have h0 : (hW.fromSpec p : T) ∈ Set.range hW.fromSpec :=
210	      Set.mem_range_self p
211	    rwa [hW.range_fromSpec] at h0
212	  rw [Module.rankAtStalk_eq,
213	    pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank G (V := ⟨W, hW⟩) _ hmem]
214	  show p.asIdeal.fiberRank Γ(G, W) = chartFiberRank G _ hmem
215	  rw [chartFiberRank]
216	  exact Ideal.fiberRank_congr_ideal
217	    (congrArg PrimeSpectrum.asIdeal (primeIdealOf_fromSpec hW p hmem)).symm
218	
219	end RankDictionary
220	
221	section PointRankPullback
222	
223	variable {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (g : Y ⟶ X) (G : X.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent]
224	
225	/-- **The point rank of a pullback module is the point rank at the image
226	point** (no flatness or finiteness hypotheses; the geometric form of
227	`Ideal.fiberRank_baseChange`): for any morphism `g : Y ⟶ X` and
228	quasi-coherent `G` on `X`,
229	`pointRank (g^*G) y = pointRank G (g y)`. -/
230	theorem pointRank_pullback (y : Y) :
231	    haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom g G ‹_›
232	    pointRank Y ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G) y = pointRank X G (g y) := by
233	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom g G ‹_›
234	  -- affine charts around the image point and the point
235	  obtain ⟨V, hV, hgyV, -⟩ :=
236	    exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := g y) (U := ⊤) trivial
237	  have hyV : y ∈ g ⁻¹ᵁ V := hgyV
238	  obtain ⟨W, hW, hyW, hWle⟩ :=
239	    exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := y) (U := g ⁻¹ᵁ V) hyV
240	  -- both sides through the two charts
241	  rw [pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank _ (V := ⟨W, hW⟩) y hyW,
242	    pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank G (V := ⟨V, hV⟩) (g y) hgyV]
243	  -- the section formula for the pullback module over the affine pair
244	  letI : Algebra Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W) := (g.appLE V W hWle).hom.toAlgebra
245	  letI : Module Γ(X, V) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, W) :=
246	    Module.compHom _ (g.appLE V W hWle).hom
247	  obtain ⟨⟨eqv, -⟩⟩ :=
248	    pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv g G hW hV hWle
249	  -- fiber rank through the equivalence, then base change
250	  have h1 : ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal).fiberRank
251	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, W) =
252	      ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal).fiberRank
253	        (TensorProduct Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W) Γ(G, V)) :=
254	    Ideal.fiberRank_congr _ eqv.symm
255	  have h2 := Ideal.fiberRank_baseChange (R := Γ(X, V)) (A := Γ(Y, W))
256	    Γ(G, V) ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal)
257	  -- identify the contracted prime with the prime of the image point
258	  have h3 : ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal).comap
259	      (algebraMap Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W)) =
260	      (hV.primeIdealOf ⟨g y, hgyV⟩).asIdeal := by
261	    have h4 := IsAffineOpen.comap_primeIdealOf_appLE (f := g)
262	      V hV W hW hWle hyW
263	    have h5 : algebraMap Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W) = (g.appLE V W hWle).hom := rfl
264	    rw [h5]
265	    exact congrArg PrimeSpectrum.asIdeal h4
266	  show ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal).fiberRank
267	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, W) =
268	    ((hV.primeIdealOf ⟨g y, hgyV⟩).asIdeal).fiberRank Γ(G, V)
269	  rw [h1, h2]
270	  exact Ideal.fiberRank_congr_ideal h3
271	
272	end PointRankPullback
273	
274	/-! ## §3 Stage D1: unique factorization through the stratum -/
275	
276	section StageD1
277	
278	variable {X T : Scheme.{u}} (G : X.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent] {e : ℕ}
279	
280	set_option maxHeartbeats 800000 in
281	/-- **The kernel bound** (the hard half of Nitsure's universal property,
282	`n = 0`, [Nitsure §4]: "`f^*𝓕` is locally free of rank `e` iff `f^*ψ = 0`
283	iff `f` factors through `V_e`"): if the pullback of `G` along `q : T ⟶ X`
284	is flat over `T` of constant point rank `e`, then the strata ideal sheaf is
285	contained in the kernel of `q` — every local relation matrix pulls back to
286	the zero matrix, so its entries die in `Γ(T, ·)`. -/
287	theorem strataData_le_ker (hcov : ChartsCover G e) (q : T ⟶ X)
288	    (hflat : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
289	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G))
290	    (hrank : ∀ t : T,
291	      haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom q G ‹_›
292	      pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G) t = e) :
293	    strataData G e hcov ≤ q.ker := by
294	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom q G ‹_›
295	  refine Scheme.IdealSheafData.le_ofIdeals_iff.mpr fun U => ?_
296	  intro r hr
297	  rw [RingHom.mem_ker]
298	  -- a finite family of `e`-presentation charts covering `U`
299	  obtain ⟨N, Vc, mmc, Pc, hVcU, hcovU⟩ :=
300	    ChartsCover.exists_finite_charts G hcov U
301	  -- the pulled-back section dies on an affine neighbourhood of each point
302	  apply T.IsSheaf.section_ext fun t ht => ?_
303	  obtain ⟨i, hti⟩ := hcovU (q.base t) ht
304	  have htVc : t ∈ q ⁻¹ᵁ (Vc i).1 := hti
305	  obtain ⟨W, hW, htW, hWle⟩ :=
306	    exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := t) (U := q ⁻¹ᵁ (Vc i).1) htVc
307	  have hV : W ≤ q ⁻¹ᵁ U.1 := fun y hy => hVcU i (hWle hy)
308	  refine ⟨W, hV, htW, ?_⟩
309	  -- the relation matrix of the chart pulls back to zero on `W`
310	  haveI hFlatW : Module.Flat Γ(T, W)
311	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G, W) :=
312	    flat_sections_of_coherentSheafFlat_id hflat hW
313	  obtain ⟨P', hP'⟩ := exists_matrixPresentation_pullback_sections q G
314	    (Vc i).2 hW hWle (Pc i)
315	  haveI : Module.Finite Γ(T, W) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G, W) :=
316	    Module.Finite.of_surjective P'.proj P'.surjective_proj
317	  have h0 : P'.relMatrix = 0 :=
318	    P'.relMatrix_eq_zero_of_flat fun p =>
319	      (rankAtStalk_sections_eq_pointRank _ hW p).trans (hrank _)
320	  -- hence the entry ideal is killed by `q.appLE (Vc i) W`
321	  letI : Algebra Γ(X, (Vc i).1) Γ(T, W) := (q.appLE (Vc i).1 W hWle).hom.toAlgebra
322	  have hker : (Pc i).entryIdeal ≤
323	      RingHom.ker (algebraMap Γ(X, (Vc i).1) Γ(T, W)) :=
324	    (_root_.Module.MatrixPresentation.relMatrix_map_eq_zero_iff
325	      (A := Γ(T, W))).mp (hP' ▸ h0)
326	  -- the strata-ideal condition at the chart
327	  have hmem : X.presheaf.map (homOfLE (hVcU i)).op r ∈ (Pc i).entryIdeal :=
328	    (mem_strataIdeal_iff G).mp hr (Vc i) (hVcU i) (mmc i) (Pc i)
329	  have hzero : (q.appLE (Vc i).1 W hWle).hom
330	      (X.presheaf.map (homOfLE (hVcU i)).op r) = 0 :=
331	    RingHom.mem_ker.mp (hker hmem)
332	  -- assemble: restriction of `q.app U r` to `W` is `q.appLE (Vc i) W` of
333	  -- the restricted section
334	  have hres : (T.presheaf.map (homOfLE hV).op).hom ((q.app U.1).hom r) =
335	      (q.appLE U.1 W hV).hom r := rfl
336	  show (T.presheaf.map (homOfLE hV).op).hom ((q.app U.1).hom r) =
337	    (T.presheaf.map (homOfLE hV).op).hom 0
338	  rw [map_zero, hres, ← appLE_base_res_apply' q (hVcU i) hWle hV r, hzero]
339	
340	/-- **Unique factorization through the rank-`e` stratum** [Nitsure §4,
341	part (ii), `n = 0` case]: a morphism `q : T ⟶ X` whose pulled-back module
342	is flat over `T` of constant point rank `e` factors uniquely through the
343	closed immersion of the rank-`e` stratum. -/
344	theorem existsUnique_stratumLift (hcov : ChartsCover G e) (q : T ⟶ X)
345	    (hflat : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
346	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G))
347	    (hrank : ∀ t : T,
348	      haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom q G ‹_›
349	      pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G) t = e) :
350	    ∃! l : T ⟶ stratum G e hcov, l ≫ stratumι G e hcov = q := by
351	  have hker : (stratumι G e hcov).ker ≤ q.ker := by
352	    have h1 : (stratumι G e hcov).ker = strataData G e hcov :=
353	      Scheme.IdealSheafData.ker_subschemeι (strataData G e hcov)
354	    rw [h1]
355	    exact strataData_le_ker G hcov q hflat hrank
356	  refine ⟨IsClosedImmersion.lift (stratumι G e hcov) q hker,
357	    IsClosedImmersion.lift_fac _ _ hker, fun l' hl' => ?_⟩
358	  rw [← cancel_mono (stratumι G e hcov), hl',
359	    IsClosedImmersion.lift_fac]
360	
361	end StageD1
362	
363	/-! ## §4 Stage D2: the stratum pullback is flat -/
364	
365	section StageD2
366	
367	variable {X : Scheme.{u}} (G : X.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent] {e : ℕ}
368	
369	set_option maxHeartbeats 800000 in
370	/-- **The rank-`e` stratum flattens `G`** [Nitsure §4, `n = 0`: on `V_e`
371	the pulled-back presentation has vanishing relation matrix, so `𝓕|_{V_e}`
372	is free of rank `e`]: the pullback of `G` along the stratum immersion is
373	flat over the stratum. -/

630	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (chartLocus F e).ι F ‹_›
631	  constructor
632	  · rintro ⟨z, rfl⟩
633	    have hz : (rankStratumι F e).base z = ((chartLocus F e).ι.base)
634	        ((stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
635	          (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)).base z) := rfl
636	    rw [hz, ← pointRank_pullback (chartLocus F e).ι F]
637	    exact (mem_range_stratumι_iff _ (chartsCover_chartLocus F e) _).mp
638	      ⟨z, rfl⟩
639	  · intro h
640	    have hs : s ∈ chartLocus F e := mem_chartLocus_of_pointRank_eq F e h
641	    have hs' : s ∈ Set.range (chartLocus F e).ι := by
642	      rwa [Scheme.Opens.range_ι]
643	    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hs'
644	    have hrx : pointRank ((chartLocus F e) : Scheme.{u})
645	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) x = e := by
646	      rw [pointRank_pullback (chartLocus F e).ι F x, hx]
647	      exact h
648	    obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := (mem_range_stratumι_iff _
649	      (chartsCover_chartLocus F e) x).mpr hrx
650	    refine ⟨z, ?_⟩
651	    show ((chartLocus F e).ι.base)
652	      ((stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
653	        (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)).base z) = s
654	    rw [show ((stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
655	      (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)).base z) = x from hz, hx]
656	
657	/-- **The rank-`e` stratum flattens `F`** [Nitsure §4, part (i)]: the
658	pullback of `F` along the stratum immersion is flat over the stratum. -/
659	theorem coherentSheafFlat_rankStratum :
660	    Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (rankStratum F e))
661	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (rankStratumι F e)).obj F) := by
662	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (chartLocus F e).ι F ‹_›
663	  intro U hU V hV eV
664	  exact coherentSheafFlat_of_iso (𝟙 (rankStratum F e))
665	    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp
666	      (stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
667	        (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)) (chartLocus F e).ι).app F)
668	    (coherentSheafFlat_stratum
669	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F)
670	      (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)) hU hV eV
671	
672	end RankStratum
673	
674	/-! ## §7 Stage E: rank bound and openness of the rank fibers -/
675	
676	section RankBound
677	
678	variable {S : Scheme.{u}}
679	
680	/-- **The point rank is bounded on a noetherian scheme**: finitely many
681	presentation charts cover `S` by quasi-compactness, and each caps the rank
682	by its generator count. -/
683	theorem exists_pointRank_le [IsNoetherian S] (F : S.Modules)
684	    [F.IsFinitePresentation] : ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ s : S, pointRank S F s ≤ N := by
685	  classical
686	  choose Vc hVc hchart using exists_presentationChart_mem (S := S) F
687	  have hcov : (Set.univ : Set S) ⊆ ⋃ s : S, ((Vc s).1 : Set S) := fun x _ =>
688	    Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨x, hVc x⟩
689	  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := isCompact_univ.elim_finite_subcover
690	    (fun s : S => ((Vc s).1 : Set S)) (fun s => (Vc s).1.isOpen) hcov
691	  refine ⟨t.sup fun s => pointRank S F s, fun x => ?_⟩
692	  obtain ⟨s, hst, hxs⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion₂.mp (ht (Set.mem_univ x))
693	  calc pointRank S F x ≤ pointRank S F s := by
694	        obtain ⟨mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := hchart s
695	        rw [pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank F (V := Vc s) x hxs]
696	        exact P.fiberRank_le _
697	    _ ≤ t.sup (fun s => pointRank S F s) := Finset.le_sup hst
698	
699	set_option maxHeartbeats 800000 in
700	/-- **The rank fibers of a flat pullback are open** (local constancy of the
701	rank of a flat, finitely presented module, geometrized through `fromSpec`):
702	if `φ^*F` is flat over `T`, the locus where its point rank equals `e` is
703	open in `T`. -/
704	theorem isOpen_pointRank_pullback_eq {T : Scheme.{u}} [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
705	    (F : S.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] (φ : T ⟶ S)
706	    (hflat : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
707	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F)) (e : ℕ) :
708	    haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom φ F inferInstance
709	    IsOpen {t : T | pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) t = e} := by
710	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom φ F inferInstance
711	  rw [isOpen_iff_forall_mem_open]
712	  intro t₀ ht₀
713	  -- affine charts: `V ∋ φ t₀` with finitely presented sections, `W ∋ t₀`
714	  obtain ⟨V, hV, hφt, -, hfin⟩ :=
715	    exists_affine_finite_sections_nhds F (φ.base t₀) ⊤ trivial
716	  haveI : IsNoetherianRing Γ(S, V) :=
717	    IsLocallyNoetherian.component_noetherian ⟨V, hV⟩
718	  haveI : Module.Finite Γ(S, V) Γ(F, V) := hfin
719	  haveI : Module.FinitePresentation Γ(S, V) Γ(F, V) :=
720	    Module.finitePresentation_of_finite _ _
721	  have ht' : t₀ ∈ φ ⁻¹ᵁ V := hφt
722	  obtain ⟨W, hW, htW, hWle⟩ :=
723	    exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := t₀) (U := φ ⁻¹ᵁ V) ht'
724	  -- section module over `W`: flat and finitely presented
725	  haveI : Module.Flat Γ(T, W) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W) :=
726	    flat_sections_of_coherentSheafFlat_id hflat hW
727	  obtain ⟨ee, mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := Module.FinitePresentation.exists_matrixPresentation
728	    (R := Γ(S, V)) (M := Γ(F, V))
729	  obtain ⟨P', -⟩ := exists_matrixPresentation_pullback_sections φ F hV hW hWle P
730	  haveI : Module.FinitePresentation Γ(T, W)
731	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W) := P'.finitePresentation
732	  -- transport the locally constant stalk rank through `fromSpec`
733	  have hlc := Module.isLocallyConstant_rankAtStalk
734	    (R := Γ(T, W)) (M := Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W))
735	  refine ⟨hW.fromSpec.base ''
736	    (Module.rankAtStalk Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W) ⁻¹' {e}),
737	    ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
738	  · rintro _ ⟨p, hp, rfl⟩
739	    show pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F)
740	      (hW.fromSpec.base p) = e
741	    rw [← rankAtStalk_sections_eq_pointRank
742	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) hW p]
743	    exact hp
744	  · exact hW.fromSpec.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap _ (hlc.isOpen_fiber e)
745	  · refine ⟨hW.primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
746	    · show Module.rankAtStalk Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W)
747	        (hW.primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩) = e
748	      rw [rankAtStalk_sections_eq_pointRank
749	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) hW]
750	      have hfs : (hW.fromSpec.base (hW.primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩) : T) = t₀ :=
751	        hW.fromSpec_primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩
752	      rw [hfs]
753	      exact ht₀
754	    · exact hW.fromSpec_primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩
755	
756	end RankBound
757	
758	/-! ## §8 Stage E: the universal factorization through a single stratum -/
759	
760	section FactorRankStratum
761	
762	variable {S : Scheme.{u}} (F : S.Modules) [F.IsQuasicoherent]
763	
764	set_option maxHeartbeats 800000 in
765	/-- **Unique factorization through the rank-`e` stratum of the base**
766	[Nitsure §4, part (ii), `n = 0`, single-rank case]: a morphism `φ : T ⟶ S`
767	whose pulled-back module is flat with *constant* point rank `e` (measured
768	on the base) factors uniquely through the locally closed immersion
769	`rankStratumι`. -/
770	theorem existsUnique_factor_rankStratum [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
771	    [F.IsFinitePresentation] (e : ℕ) {T : Scheme.{u}} (φ : T ⟶ S)
772	    (hflat : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
773	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F))
774	    (hrank : ∀ t : T, pointRank S F (φ.base t) = e) :
775	    ∃! l : T ⟶ rankStratum F e, l ≫ rankStratumι F e = φ := by
776	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (chartLocus F e).ι F inferInstance
777	  -- `φ` lands in the chart locus
778	  have hrange : Set.range φ.base ⊆ Set.range (chartLocus F e).ι.base := by
779	    rintro _ ⟨t, rfl⟩
780	    have h1 : φ.base t ∈ chartLocus F e :=
781	      mem_chartLocus_of_pointRank_eq F e (hrank t)
782	    have h2 : (chartLocus F e : Set S) ⊆ Set.range (chartLocus F e).ι.base := by
783	      rw [Scheme.Opens.range_ι]
784	    exact h2 h1
785	  set q : T ⟶ (chartLocus F e : Scheme.{u}) :=
786	    IsOpenImmersion.lift (chartLocus F e).ι φ hrange with hq
787	  have hqfac : q ≫ (chartLocus F e).ι = φ :=
788	    IsOpenImmersion.lift_fac (chartLocus F e).ι φ hrange
789	  -- flatness of the pullback along `q`
790	  have hflat_q : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
791	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj
792	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F)) := by
793	    intro U hU V hV eV
794	    exact coherentSheafFlat_of_iso (𝟙 T)
795	      (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp q (chartLocus F e).ι).app F ≪≫
796	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr hqfac).app F).symm) hflat hU hV eV
797	  -- constant rank of the pullback along `q`
798	  have hrank_q : ∀ t : T,
799	      haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom q
800	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) ‹_›
801	      pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj
802	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F)) t = e := by
803	    intro t
804	    rw [pointRank_pullback q ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) t,
805	      pointRank_pullback (chartLocus F e).ι F]
806	    have hpt : (chartLocus F e).ι.base (q.base t) = φ.base t := by
807	      have := congrArg (fun m : T ⟶ S => m.base t) hqfac

132	/-- Transport of `Module.Flat` between the canonical module structure and a
133	`Module.compHom` structure along a pointwise-identity ring endomorphism
134	(the `appLE` of the identity morphism is the identity restriction, but not
135	definitionally the identity ring hom). -/
136	private lemma flat_compHom_congr {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {M : Type u}
137	    [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M] (f : R →+* R) (hf : ∀ r, f r = r) :
138	    (letI : Module R M := Module.compHom M f
139	     Module.Flat R M) ↔ Module.Flat R M := by
140	  have h : (Module.compHom M f : Module R M) = ‹Module R M› :=
141	    Module.ext' _ _ fun r m => by
142	      show f r • m = r • m
143	      rw [hf r]
144	  exact (congrArg (fun i : Module R M => @Module.Flat R M _ _ i) h).to_iff
